title: Update Q1 pricing for wholesale clients
description: Review margins and update wholesale price lists for Q1. Focus on oils and specialty items where supplier costs changed.

comments.author: Sarah Chen
comments.text: Started reviewing supplier invoices. Oils are up 8% from last quarter.

title: Reorder Truffle Oil — running low
description: Stock at 45 units. With current velocity we'll be out in ~2 weeks. Contact Mediterranean Imports for reorder.

title: Follow up with Grand Hotel proposal
description: Sent proposal for monthly supply contract last week. They requested custom pricing on specialty items. Need to follow up by Friday.

comments.author: AI Agent
comments.text: Sent follow-up email on Feb 17. Awaiting response from their procurement team.

comments.author: Mike Rodriguez
comments.text: They mentioned they're comparing with two other suppliers. Let's sharpen our pricing on the truffle products.

title: Reconcile January invoices with Cin7
description: Match all January wholesale invoices against Cin7 records. Flag any discrepancies for review.

title: Set up automated low-stock alerts
description: Configure the system to send Slack notifications when any product drops below minimum threshold. Use the reorder points from the inventory sheet.

title: Process Zenith Catering order #1017
description: Large wholesale order still unfulfilled. Check Prosciutto stock — may need to partial fulfill or source from backup supplier.

comments.author: James Wilson
comments.text: Prosciutto is out of stock. Checking with backup supplier in Brooklyn.

title: Prepare monthly sales report — January
description: Compile retail + wholesale numbers, top products, margin analysis. Present at Monday ops sync.

comments.author: AI Agent
comments.text: Report generated and shared in Google Drive. Summary: Total revenue $42,800 (+12% MoM).

title: Onboard Mediterranean Imports as supplier
description: New specialty supplier. Need to set up in Cin7, agree on payment terms, catalog their products.

comments.author: Sarah Chen
comments.text: Waiting on their product catalog and wholesale price list.

title: Fix inventory sync discrepancy — Miso Paste
description: Cin7 shows 12 units but physical count is 0. Investigate and correct.

title: Create Valentine's Day gift bundle page
description: Curate a gift bundle with chocolates, honey, truffle oil. Add to website with nice photos.

comments.author: Mike Rodriguez
comments.text: Live on the site! Already got 8 orders.

title: Review and approve Q1 marketing budget
description: Priya prepared the budget breakdown. Need Sarah's sign-off before we commit to the trade show booth.

title: Schedule quarterly inventory audit
description: Full physical count needed. Coordinate with James on timing — preferably a low-volume weekday.

title: Update product photos for website
description: Several new products don't have proper photos. Coordinate with photographer for a half-day shoot.

title: Negotiate better shipping rates with FedEx
description: Current rates are eating into margins on small retail orders. Get quotes from UPS and DHL too.

comments.author: James Wilson
comments.text: Locked in 15% discount with FedEx for 6-month commitment. Saves ~$400/month.

title: Build customer loyalty program proposal
description: Draft a loyalty/rewards program for repeat retail customers. Look at points-based and tier-based models.

comments.author: AI Agent
comments.text: Research complete. Drafting proposal with 3 tier options. Will share by Feb 25.
